calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a prove up hearing for a request for Default Judgment as to Defendant Chunlei Liu.

Dept.505: Judge: Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Pliego; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:09:59 a.m. and concluding at 9:11:35 a.m.(D505)

Christopher Danna, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Chunlei Liu not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for common counts/ open book account/collections filed April 7, 2021.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Chunlei Liu filed January 28, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendants Chunlei Liu on March 22, 2022.
Doe Defendants dismissed on April 13, 2023.

Pursuant to CCP 585(d) declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff grants the request for default judgment against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant the following:

Damages $38,411.29
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $599.84
Other $0

Total Judgment $39,011.13

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.
